etymology.description: semantic 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") + phonetic 合(合) (hé, "to combine") -> reply
etymology.interpretation: The character 荅(dá, "reply") uses 艸 to signify plants, reflecting growth or interaction, combined with 合 as a phonetic component to provide the sound "dá." The notion of replying is metaphorically linked to growth and interaction, as in a back-and-forth exchange.
